message:
fix: stale cache after registration + fast_only search mode bypass

identity.rs — Cache coherence bug (HIGH):
  After generating registration_token and persisting to DB, the
  in-memory AgentRow still had registration_token: None. When put
  into the read cache, subsequent resolve_agent calls would serve
  the stale row, and sender_token verification in send_message
  would silently downgrade to unverified. Now sets
  row.registration_token before cache insertion.

search_two_tier.rs — fast_only mode violated:
  When fast_only=true but no fast embedder available, the iterator
  fell through to the quality refinement phase, violating the
  fast_only contract. Now correctly returns None when fast_only
  is set and the fast embedder is unavailable. Added test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
